_comment: The DEV template's pinned shape (github.com/stadium-software/stadium-8). This is one of two per-target recipes — the dev version is judged against THIS file, never against release's. It starts equal to the release baseline (v1.1.0); when dev moves ahead, run `QA_TARGET=dev npm run reconcile` against a dev checkout and update the lists below so dev is judged against its OWN shape.
